title: Foxy’s Cheating Game
description: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene focuses on Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This cheese is to your liking...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, well take a seat anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So I've developed a strong stomach.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You youngsters and your fragile constitution...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: See, what'd I say, you retard!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then how about travelling by boat?

summary: Nami, Usopp, and Robin face Foxy’s tricks in the first Davy Back Fight event while Luffy learns how serious the stakes are.
